name: search-menu
title: Search Menu
description: A reusable command-palette search menu with grouped items, icons, descriptions, keyboard shortcut support, and a responsive search trigger.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://inlang.com/schema/inlang-message-format",
  "search_menu_title": "Search",
  "search_menu_description": "Search for an item to open.",
  "search_menu_placeholder": "Search...",
  "search_menu_input_placeholder": "Search...",
  "search_menu_empty": "No results found."
}

{
  "$schema": "https://inlang.com/schema/inlang-message-format",
  "search_menu_title": "Recherche",
  "search_menu_description": "Recherchez un élément à ouvrir.",
  "search_menu_placeholder": "Rechercher...",
  "search_menu_input_placeholder": "Rechercher...",
  "search_menu_empty": "Aucun résultat trouvé."
}
